blended.narrative: Willamette Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 13".
